meta.note: Reference file. Currently, data is loaded from js/data.js (works without a server). When hosted on GitHub Pages or Netlify, you can switch to fetch('/data/projects.json') in main.js.

projects.title: The Migration Arc
projects.description: An end-to-end cloud migration and deployment platform simulating a real-world scenario of moving a workload from on-premises infrastructure to the cloud - with full CI/CD automation, containerization, and multi-cloud deployment across Azure and AWS.
projects.architecture: Code Push → GitHub Actions CI/CD → Docker Build → Terraform Provision → Azure + AWS Deploy → Monitoring
projects.problem: Organizations face high-risk, manual migration processes when moving workloads to the cloud. This project automates the full migration lifecycle - reducing human error, enforcing infrastructure consistency, and enabling repeatable deployments across multiple cloud providers.

projects.title: Azure VM + Bash Automation
projects.description: Automated deployment of a Linux VM on Azure with NGINX installation, configuration, and networking setup handled entirely through Bash scripts.
projects.architecture: Azure CLI → VM Provision → Bash Scripts → NGINX Config → NSG Rules → Public Endpoint
projects.problem: Manual VM setup is slow, error-prone, and non-repeatable. This project automates the full deployment lifecycle from VM creation to serving traffic.

projects.title: Infrastructure Monitoring Stack
projects.description: A full-stack monitoring and alerting system using Prometheus, Grafana, and AlertManager to track the health, performance, and availability of cloud infrastructure.
projects.architecture: Prometheus Scrape → Metrics Store → Grafana Dashboards → AlertManager → Notification Rules
projects.problem: Without observability, production issues go undetected until users report them. This project establishes a monitoring baseline with automated alerting for threshold breaches.
